subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the holy fragrances that waft from the realm of thy Lord's bounty, the All-Merciful, the Compassionate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس التی تهب من مهب موهبه ربک الرحمن الرحیم و لمثلک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual warfare; struggle, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
